title: Die With A Smile
why_this_song: Die With A Smile by Lady Gaga (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I, I just woke up from a dream
But you and I had to say goodbye
And I don't know what it all means
If the world was ending, I'd wanna be next to you
Oh-ooh, lost, lost in the words that we scream

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "next" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "next" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "world" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "world" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I, I just woke up from a dream
I'd wanna hold you just for a while

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: But you and I had to say goodbye
Wherever you go, that's where I'll follow

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Die With A Smile" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Die With A Smile" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Die With A Smile" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Die With A Smile", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Die With A Smile" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Die With A Smile" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Die With A Smile" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Die With A Smile" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?
